name: parliament-winterthur-tool
description: Nextcloud-Plugin für die Fraktionsarbeit im Winterthurer Parlament

scripts.build:app: npm run clean && webpack --node-env production --config parlwin/webpack.js && npm run build:css
scripts.clean: rm -rf parlwin/js/parlwin-main.js parlwin/js/parlwin-main.js.map parlwin/js/calendar-prefill.js parlwin/js/calendar-prefill.js.map parlwin/js/admin.js parlwin/js/admin.js.map parlwin/js/chunks parlwin/css/parlwin-style.css parlwin/css/parlwin-style.css.map
scripts.test:unit: cd parlwin && phpunit --bootstrap tests/bootstrap.php --exclude-group live --fail-on-warning --fail-on-risky --fail-on-deprecation --fail-on-notice --fail-on-skipped --fail-on-incomplete tests
scripts.test:live: cd parlwin && phpunit --bootstrap tests/bootstrap.php --group live --fail-on-warning --fail-on-risky --fail-on-deprecation --fail-on-notice --fail-on-skipped --fail-on-incomplete tests/Service/ScraperLiveEndpointTest.php
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:js && npm run test:live && npm run test:e2e
